sections.title: If the event is not yours

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: Sorry, it's [player name] that's having the lucky day.

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: WRONG! That's just WRONG! Okay, next question!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: BZZZZZZZ! WRONG! Okay, next question!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: No, you're WRONG! Okay, next question!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: No, sorry. Try harder! Okay, next question!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: Better luck next time! Okay, next question!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: Nope, that's not it. Okay, next question!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: Huh...? Didn't you know that one? Okay, next question!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: No, no, no... That's completely WRONG! Okay, next question!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: WRONG WRONG WRONG! Okay, next question!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: DING DING DING! That's RIGHT! Good for you! Okay, next question!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: Absolutely RIGHT! Keep going for the win! Okay, next question!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: COR-RECT! Okay, next question!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: Hey, you're good at this! CORRECT! Okay, next question!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: Wow, you're a smart one! You're absolutely RIGHT! Okay, next question!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: YES! You're RIGHT! Okay, next question!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: CONGRATULATIONS! You are a WINNER! Please choose your PRIZE!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: It's your lucky day, [player name]! You've got a chance to win big prizes in my quiz show. Would you like to play?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please, I'm so excited!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: WELCOME to the GREATEST QUIZ SHOW in the entire of Gielinor!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: O D D ! O N E ! O U T !

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: Please welcome our newest contestant: [player name]! Four questions right, and then you win! You know the rules, so let's begin!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: Hey [player name]! It's your lucky day!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: Wakey-wakey, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: You're in for a treat, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: Come along with me, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: Hey [player name]! It's your lucky day!

lines.speaker: Quiz Master
lines.text: Maybe later.
